ast: uniq(1)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+-----------------------------+
| Column | Data                        |
+--------+-----------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1])) |
| Output | UInt64([1])                 |
+--------+-----------------------------+


ast: uniq(c)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+------------------------------+
| Column | Data                         |
+--------+------------------------------+
| c      | Column(UInt64([1, 2, 1, 3])) |
| Output | UInt64([3])                  |
+--------+------------------------------+

evaluation (internal):
+--------+------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                     |
+--------+------------------------------------------+
| s      | Column(StringColumn[abc, def, opq, xyz]) |
| Output | UInt64([4])                              |
+--------+------------------------------------------+

evaluation (internal):
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                                               |
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| s_null | Column(NullableColumn { column: StringColumn[a, , c, d], validity: [0b____1101] }) |
| Output | UInt64([3])                                                                        |
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: uniq(a, c)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+------------------------------+
| Column | Data                         |
+--------+------------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1]))  |

| Output | UInt64([4])                  |
+--------+------------------------------+

evaluation (internal):

| Column | Data                                                                            |
